Parakeet TDT 0.6B (assets/test.wav, ~15s.notes: Response byte-identical. C++ warm total ~7% faster; both paths share the same C++ graph kernels — Python overhead is the per-step argmax/state-copy wrapper that the C++ TDT loop replaces. Python emits more decoder_steps because it counts skipped frames too.
